---
title: "A3_Report"
format: html
---

# Packages

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(unmarked)
```

# Data

```{r, message=FALSE}
tot_landcover <- read_csv("landcover_total_scotland.csv")

d <- read_csv("250000540.csv")
```

# Part A

## Occupancy Model

### Data Wrangling

```{r}
occ_dat <- d |>
  mutate(site = consecutive_id(x, y)) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = visit, values_from = c(obs, rain, wind)) 

occ_dat <- occ_dat |>
  select(species, x, y, site, 
         obs_1, obs_2, obs_3, obs_4, 
         Urban, Coniferous, Broadleaf, MountainHeathBog, Freshwater,
         rain_1, rain_2, rain_3, rain_4, wind_1, wind_2, wind_3, wind_4)

y_mat <- occ_dat |> 
  select(obs_1, obs_2, obs_3, obs_4) 

site_covs <- occ_dat |>
  select(Urban, Coniferous, Broadleaf, MountainHeathBog, Freshwater)

obs_covs_rain <- occ_dat |>
  select(rain_1, rain_2, rain_3, rain_4)

obs_covs_wind <- occ_dat |>
  select(wind_1, wind_2, wind_3, wind_4)

obs_covs <- list(rain = obs_covs_rain, wind = obs_covs_wind)
```

### Model Code / Eval

```{r}
umf <- unmarkedFrameOccu(y = y_mat, # observations
                         siteCovs = site_covs, # site covariates
                         obsCovs = obs_covs) # observation covariates
```

```{r}
summary(umf)
```

```{r}
m1 <- occu(formula = ~ 1 ~ 1, 
           data = umf)

m2 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ 1, 
           data = umf)

m3 <- occu(formula = ~ 1 ~ Urban + Coniferous + Broadleaf + MountainHeathBog + Freshwater,
           data = umf)

m4 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Urban + Coniferous + Broadleaf + MountainHeathBog + Freshwater,
           data = umf) 

mod_list <- fitList(m1,m2,m3,m4)
```

```{r}
eval_list <- modSel(mod_list)
eval_list
```

M4 appears to be the best model based on AIC, variable selection time.

```{r}
# Null model
m4_1 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ 1, data = umf)

# 1 variable
m4_2 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Urban, data = umf)
m4_3 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Coniferous, data = umf)
m4_4 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Broadleaf, data = umf)
m4_5 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ MountainHeathBog, data = umf)
m4_6 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Freshwater, data = umf)

# 2 variables
m4_7 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Urban + Coniferous, data = umf)
m4_8 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Urban + Broadleaf, data = umf)
m4_9 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Urban + MountainHeathBog, data = umf)
m4_10 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Urban + Freshwater, data = umf)
m4_11 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Coniferous + Broadleaf, data = umf)
m4_12 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Coniferous + MountainHeathBog, data = umf)
m4_13 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Coniferous + Freshwater, data = umf)
m4_14 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Broadleaf + MountainHeathBog, data = umf)
m4_15 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Broadleaf + Freshwater, data = umf)
m4_16 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ MountainHeathBog + Freshwater, data = umf)

# 3 variables
m4_17 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Urban + Coniferous + Broadleaf, data = umf)
m4_18 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Urban + Coniferous + MountainHeathBog, data = umf)
m4_19 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Urban + Coniferous + Freshwater, data = umf)
m4_20 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Urban + Broadleaf + MountainHeathBog, data = umf)
m4_21 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Urban + Broadleaf + Freshwater, data = umf)
m4_22 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Urban + MountainHeathBog + Freshwater, data = umf)
m4_23 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Coniferous + Broadleaf + MountainHeathBog, data = umf)
m4_24 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Coniferous + Broadleaf + Freshwater, data = umf)
m4_25 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Coniferous + MountainHeathBog + Freshwater, data = umf)
m4_26 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Broadleaf + MountainHeathBog + Freshwater, data = umf)

# 4 variables
m4_27 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Urban + Coniferous + Broadleaf + MountainHeathBog, data = umf)
m4_28 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Urban + Coniferous + Broadleaf + Freshwater, data = umf)
m4_29 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Urban + Coniferous + MountainHeathBog + Freshwater, data = umf)
m4_30 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Urban + Broadleaf + MountainHeathBog + Freshwater, data = umf)
m4_31 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Coniferous + Broadleaf + MountainHeathBog + Freshwater, data = umf)

# 5 variables
m4_32 <- occu(formula = ~ wind + rain ~ Urban + Coniferous + Broadleaf + MountainHeathBog + Freshwater, data = umf)

# Fit list
m4_list <- fitList(m4_1, m4_2, m4_3, m4_4, m4_5, m4_6, m4_7, m4_8, m4_9, m4_10,
                   m4_11, m4_12, m4_13, m4_14, m4_15, m4_16, m4_17, m4_18, m4_19, m4_20,
                   m4_21, m4_22, m4_23, m4_24, m4_25, m4_26, m4_27, m4_28, m4_29, m4_30,
                   m4_31, m4_32)
```

```{r}
m4_eval_list <- modSel(m4_list)
m4_eval_list
```
